name: My boss pressured me to not file my claim—is that legal?
description: No. It's illegal retaliation. Document all conversations and file your claim anyway. You may have grounds for a separate retaliation lawsuit if they take advers

mainEntity.name: My boss pressured me to not file my claim—is that legal?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. It's illegal retaliation. Document all conversations and file your claim anyway. You may have grounds for a separate retaliation lawsuit if they take adverse action against you.
